hero.title: Живой анимированный сайт по запросу
hero.description: Бриф → пресет → проверка → живой URL. Next.js, Framer Motion и GSAP из каталога — код принадлежит вам, не редактору.

footer.tagline: Site Factory · brief → preset → live URL · код ваш

logos.title: Trusted by teams shipping polished UI

bento.title: Built as a composable grid
bento.subtitle: Bento layouts highlight one primary story block without breaking the motion stack underneath.
bento.tip: Tip: duplicate this section and swap cells content — grid spans stay in className.

motion.title: Motion system
motion.body: Shared Framer variants and GSAP scroll primitives — one vocabulary across pages.

figma.title: Figma merge
figma.body: Design context + motion context by node id.

shadcn.title: shadcn UI
shadcn.body: Dialogs, sheets, tabs with accessible defaults.

lenis.title: Lenis scroll
lenis.body: Smooth wheel synced with ScrollTrigger pin sections.

dark.title: Dark mode
dark.body: Class-based theme with brand OKLCH tokens.

ship.title: Ship faster
ship.body: Scaffold from web-motion-starter, customize sections, run visual QA.

scrollStory.title: Scroll-driven storytelling
scrollStory.subtitleActive: Section pins while you scroll; progress and steps scrub with Lenis + GSAP.
scrollStory.subtitleReduced: Static layout — motion disabled for reduced-motion preference.

design.title: Design in Figma
design.body: Layout, typography, and motion on the same artboard.

export.title: Export motion context
export.body: Keyframes, easing, and snippets via Figma MCP.

merge.title: Merge into React
merge.body: Match data-node-id, wrap with motion.* or GSAP timelines.

ship.title: Ship
ship.body: Lenis scroll, reduced-motion fallbacks, shadcn UI polish.

timeline.title: Roadmap timeline
timeline.subtitle: Vertical milestones with a connecting rail. Each item reveals on scroll.

q1.title: Starter & motion primitives
q1.body: Framer + GSAP + Lenis providers, section catalog, site-builder skill.

q2.title: Figma token sync
q2.body: Variable defs flow into brand-palette.css and motion CSS tokens.

q3.title: Reference sites
q3.body: SaaS, agency, and minimal typography templates for agent copy-paste.

testimonials.title: What teams say
testimonials.subtitle: Patterns you can copy into client projects without rewriting motion from scratch.

elena.quote: We replaced three animation libraries with this stack. Scroll storytelling finally feels cohesive.
elena.author: Elena V.

marcus.quote: Figma motion context landed in React with matching easing — no more guessing keyframes in DevTools.
marcus.author: Marcus T.

sofia.quote: Lenis + ScrollTrigger sync was the missing piece. Pin sections work on the first try.
sofia.author: Sofia R.

team.title: People behind the work
team.subtitle: Replace names and bios with your team — avatars use initials until photos are wired via next/image.

alex.name: Alex Morgan
alex.bio: Leads visual language, Figma systems, and motion specs for client launches.

jordan.name: Jordan Lee
jordan.bio: Ships Next.js landings — Framer for UI, GSAP for scroll, Lenis for feel.

samira.name: Samira Okonkwo
samira.bio: Bridges design tokens, shadcn UI, and accessibility reviews before deploy.

chris.name: Chris Park
chris.bio: Convex, Stripe, and form flows when the landing needs more than static pages.

features.title: Как устроена фабрика
features.subtitle: Не рисуем сайт с нуля — собираем из каталога секций, тем и пресетов.

framer.title: Каталог секций
framer.body: Hero, features, pricing, FAQ, contact — комнаты завода. Варианты editorial / bento-lite / compare.

gsap.title: Живой motion
gsap.body: Framer Motion для UI, GSAP ScrollTrigger для scroll-кино, Lenis для плавного скролла.

lenis.title: Brief → URL
lenis.body: brief.json → scaffold → QA gates → Vercel. Предсказуемый конвейер, не импровизация.

tokens.title: Пресеты
tokens.body: SaaS, Agency, Launch, Demo — готовые планировки с theme packs.

figma.title: Код ваш
figma.body: Next.js на Vercel. Не lock-in Framer: репозиторий и домен у вас.

production.title: Живые примеры
production.body: site-ref-saas · site-ref-agency · site-ref-launch — смотрите до заказа.

pricing.title: Пакеты
pricing.subtitle: Фиксированные сроки. Цена — по согласованию; кнопка ведёт к брифу.

starter.name: Flash
starter.description: Каркас + тема + variants + публичный URL. Без глубокой полировки текстов.

pro.name: Sprint
pro.description: Flash + тексты, legal-страницы, форма заявок, домен.

team.name: Build
team.description: Sprint + Stripe, CMS-lite, analytics, Resend, мультистраницы.

stack.a: Нет. Вы получаете свой Next.js-код с motion-стеком фабрики. Не аренда редактора и не vibe-app без каталога.

figma.a: Да — в Cursor через Figma MCP. Структура и motion подтягиваются в секции каталога, а не в случайный JSX.

stripe.a: Пресет, theme, variants, базовые тексты, QA и live URL. Глубокий копирайт, домен и бэкенд — в Sprint/Build.

a11y.a: Lenis, pin и 3D отключаются при prefers-reduced-motion. UI на Base UI / shadcn.

contact.a: Форма ниже (#contact). Email попадает в очередь leads; ответ обычно в течение рабочего дня.

deploy.a: Вы. Фабрика собирает и выкладывает; доступы Vercel/GitHub передаём при сдаче.

ui.title: UI + motion
ui.subtitle: shadcn-style components (Base UI) with Framer Motion tab transitions.

dialog.title: Modal with motion
dialog.description: Base UI enter/exit via data-starting-style. Pair with Framer for in-content animations.

sheet.title: Side panel
sheet.description: Slides from the edge — good for filters, nav, or detail views.

motion.label: Motion
motion.title: Motion primitives
motion.body: FadeIn, StaggerChildren, and ScrollReveal live in src/components/motion/. Compose them with shadcn UI for polished sections.

figma.label: Figma
figma.title: Figma pipeline
figma.body: Paste a Figma URL — get_design_context for layout, get_motion_context for keyframes. Merge by data-node-id.

stack.label: Stack
stack.title: Stack
stack.body: Next.js 16, Framer Motion, GSAP ScrollTrigger, Lenis, Base UI + shadcn styling.

contact.title: Оставить бриф
contact.description: Коротко: бренд, ниша, пакет (Flash/Sprint/Build), ссылки на референсы. Ответим с следующим шагом.
contact.genericError: Что-то пошло не так — попробуйте ещё раз

cta.title: Готовы к живому URL?
cta.description: Выберите пакет, оставьте email — соберём сайт из каталога секций с motion, который уже обкатан на live-референсах.

MotionLab.title: Motion lab
MotionLab.description: Live previews of every primitive in src/components/motion/. Hover CTAs to feel magnetic pull; scroll down for GSAP reveals.

demos.textRevealSample: Words blur in one by one for hero headlines
demos.scrollRevealBlock: Scroll-triggered block {index} — scrubbed with Lenis + ScrollTrigger
demos.parallaxHint: Scroll this page — blob moves on Y
demos.scrollProgressBefore: Thin primary bar at the very top of every page — mounted in
demos.scrollProgressAfter: . Scroll this page to see it fill.
demos.tiltBody: Move pointer — used on team cards
demos.backToTopBefore: Floating button bottom-right after ~600px scroll — uses Lenis
demos.hero3dBefore: WebGL wireframe loads lazily on the home hero (desktop only, skipped when

StatusPage.title: Status
StatusPage.metaDescription: Live Convex dashboard: subscriptions, leads, and CMS content preview.
StatusPage.convexDisabled: Convex is not configured for this build. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL and run npm run dev:convex to enable live panels.

seedAll.title: Dev tools
seedAll.hint: Populate all demo tables at once. Set ALLOW_DEV_SEED=true in Convex env first.

subscriptions.title: Subscription status
subscriptions.description: Real-time data from Convex — updates when Stripe webhooks fire.
subscriptions.empty: No subscriptions yet — complete a test checkout or seed demo data.

leads.title: Newsletter leads
leads.empty: No signups yet — use the form on the home page or seed demo data.

cms.title: CMS content
cms.descriptionOn: Marketing strings in cmsContent — wired to hero when NEXT_PUBLIC_CMS=true (enabled)
cms.descriptionOff: Marketing strings in cmsContent — wired to hero when NEXT_PUBLIC_CMS=true (off — set env to apply on home)
cms.empty: No CMS rows — seed demo hero copy or insert via Convex dashboard.
cms.writeLocked: Writes locked — set ALLOW_DEV_SEED=true in Convex env to show the editor and seed controls (keep off on production).

cmsEditor.title: Quick edit
cmsEditor.hint: Requires ALLOW_DEV_SEED=true in Convex env. Home page needs NEXT_PUBLIC_CMS=true to reflect changes.
cmsEditor.saved: Saved — refresh home to see update.

intro.heading: Overview
intro.body: This demo template explains how a Site Factory project may handle information. Replace with your counsel-approved policy before production use.

data.heading: Data we collect
data.body: If Convex contact is enabled, we store email addresses submitted on the contact form in the leads table. Payment data is processed by Stripe when checkout is configured — we do not store card numbers on our servers.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: We may use essential cookies for theme preference and session. Analytics cookies only run when an analytics feature flag is enabled.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: You may request access or deletion of lead records by contacting the site operator. Replace this section with jurisdiction-specific rights.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Update this section with your privacy contact email.

intro.heading: Agreement
intro.body: By using this demo site you agree to these placeholder terms. Replace with your legal terms before offering paid services.

use.heading: Acceptable use
use.body: Do not misuse forms, attempt to disrupt the service, or use the site for unlawful purposes.

liability.heading: Liability
liability.body: The template is provided as-is for demonstration. Limit liability according to your counsel’s advice.

changes.heading: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; the date above reflects the latest revision of this demo copy.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms: replace with your support email.

AboutPage.title: People and craft behind the stack
AboutPage.description: A short studio page composed from the team and CTA sections — swap copy for your brand.

CasePage.indexDescription: File-based case pages under content/cases/. Start with the demo case.

BlogPage.indexDescription: File-based posts under content/blog/. No headless CMS required.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: This route does not exist. Head back to the demo landing or browse the motion lab.
